title: Interactive forest-plot viewer (researcher-facing, static site)
context: A researcher-facing static-site forest-plot viewer over the released dataset, with comparability caveats enforced in the UI. Explicitly NOT a patient tool. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Build a static-site interactive forest-plot viewer over the released dataset that surfaces comparability flags and caveats and is labeled researcher-facing, not a patient tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Viewer renders forest plots from the released dataset with comparability flags/caveats surfaced in the UI.
Explicitly labeled researcher-facing / not a patient tool; carries 'not medical advice'.
Static site builds reproducibly from the released artifacts.
output: A committed static-site forest-plot viewer building from the released dataset.
